main.initialize: First connection of the day, data are being initialized, please wait... {{progression}}%

error.generic: An error occured while initializing game data: {{error}}

about.daily_reset: Daily reset happens at midnight UTC+0
about.shika_intro: This website is using Shika for its analytics
about.shika_privacy: You can see all the data collected on here:
about.shika_tracking: Please note that Shika doesn't collect any data that allow to track individual users
about.source_code: The website source code is available at on
about.issue: For any inquiery, please open an issue or a conversation there

rules.goal_1: Your goal is to find what PC game is hidden behind this description
rules.goal_2: For that, use the input bar at the top to enter words
rules.green_1: If the word appear green, good job, you just found a word!
rules.green_2: Once you enter more, the word will then turn white
rules.orange_1: If the word appear orange, eeh, you are close but that's not totally it.
rules.orange_2: Watch the transparency of the word tho, the more opaque, the closer it is to the word you're looking for!
rules.length: A last little tip before you go, click on a word you haven't found to see the amount of characters it contains

settings.language_warn: Language availability will depend of the daily game found
